sprint: Returning Creator Path Unified onto the Single-Video Gate+Lumo Pipeline
task: "ok . its bearable. now lets get into creator path. i have uploaded another video for you. its essentially same video but w/o egg." A real, hand-supplied clip (gate-sequence-final-no-egg.mp4, audio track stripped to match every other Gateway video's muted convention) shows the identical arc the Traveller path's own gate-sequence-final.mp4 already used -- doors alone -> Lumo flies in and lands, standing, wings spread -> leaps into flight -> carries through the now-open doors into the light -- minus the Story Egg, since the Egg is purely a Traveller/Ceremony concept and a Returning Creator has already been through their own Ceremony. This retires the ENTIRE old seven-scene, two-video, CSS-composited pipeline the Returning Creator path used (mountGates/mountLumo/preloadGateVideo/playApproachLeadIn/playJourney/playArrival/spawnMagicSparks/playGateAwaken/playGateOpen/playThreshold/playLumoArrival/runGatesSequence, plus resolveLumo() and every LUMO_FLY_*/GATE_VIDEO_SRC/WIND_RISE_MS/JOURNEY_MS/ARRIVE_MS/PAUSE_MS/SPARK_LEAD_MS/AWAKEN_MS/OPEN_FALLBACK_MS/DOLLY_MS constant behind it) -- confirmed genuinely unused by either path once this shipped, so deleted outright rather than left as dead code, along with the matching CSS (.gateway-lumo-*, .gateway-gate-halo, .gateway-gate-gather-particle, .gateway-gates-journey/-arrive, .gateway-hush, .gateway-magic-sparks/-spark, .gateway-threshold-dolly, and their keyframes). Both paths now share one mechanism, runVideoSequence(video,opts) inside js/gatewaySequence.js's begin(): mount the real clip alone, paused on frame 0; a deliberate hold; for the Returning Creator only (opts.preLines set), the existing 'Welcome home.'/'Show me your stars.' recognition line plays first, HEARD not witnessed, then the existing Creator Signature tap challenge verifies who's arrived (js/magicCardUI.js's MagicCardUI.beginCreatorSignature, reused unmodified -- Lumo is the Gatekeeper in both experiences, so the Gateway is briefly, non-destructively hidden for this one interlude exactly as before); a first-time Traveller has no preLines and skips straight to the next step. Segment 1 plays to the same PAUSE_AT_S=5 confirmed via ffmpeg frame extraction to hold the identical standing pose on both clips through ~5.5s; opts.pauseLines then speak IN PERSON over that held frame (the Traveller's own rich 5-line GREETING_LINES, or the Returning Creator's own short reunion pair, LUMO_ARRIVAL_RETURNING_LINES -- repurposed from the old Scene-7-only mechanism into this shared pause-point role); Segment 2 resumes from the exact same timestamp (a genuine no-op seek) and plays to the clip's own real end; a brief final flash via the already-shared playFinalFlash, then hand-off. preloadFinalGateVideo()/mountFinalGate() (built for the Traveller path) are now generalized/reused as-is for both clips. Verified via a new 18-assertion Playwright suite exercising the full Returning Creator flow end-to-end (the no-egg clip mounts with zero halo/particle/Lumo-stage elements; the recognition line plays before any playback starts; the video is confirmed NOT playing during that line; the Gateway hides for the real Creator Signature challenge and a real pattern tap correctly verifies it; Segment 1 only then starts; the reunion line plays in person at the pause; Segment 2 resumes with zero skip; the sequence completes) plus a Traveller-path spot-check confirming zero regression; the existing 15-assertion pipeline suite (updated for the Returning Creator's own now-correct new-video/no-halo assertions -- the two prior failures were confirmed to be exactly the old, now-intentionally-superseded behavior, not a regression) and a dedicated Gateway-to-Studio-boot hand-off smoke test (both paths correctly reach Creation Flow/the ambient companion afterward) all pass, zero console errors. Both goldenBuild.js suites (World Builder v1 and v2, unaffected -- this sprint touches zero Builder files) pass unchanged. assets/video/gateway/README.md rewritten to document all three real Gate clips (the superseded gate-sequence.mp4, the Traveller's gate-sequence-final.mp4, the Returning Creator's new gate-sequence-final-no-egg.mp4) and the now-unified mechanism; the separately-uploaded gate-sequence-01.mp4 (showing Lumo flying INTO the gate, a real canon conflict with this file's own frozen 'Lumo never enters the Hall' rule) remains disclosed and unwired pending explicit product direction. No Theme Contract/Engine V2 Scene Model/Builder/Creator Governing Rules change; confined to js/gatewaySequence.js, css/style.css, assets/video/gateway/ (a new video + poster), and its README.
